overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 21 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 21 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary_zh: 重点：Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.summary_en: Focus: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

items.title: NVIDIA Accelerates Google DeepMind’s DiffusionGemma for Local AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：Today, Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma — an experimental open model built for exceptionally fast text generation. NVIDIA has optimized DiffusionGemma to run even faster across NVIDIA GeForce RTX GPUs, the NVIDIA RTX PRO platform and NVIDIA DGX Spark
items.summary_en: Focus: Today, Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma — an experimental open model built for exceptionally fast text generation. NVIDIA has optimized DiffusionGemma to run even faster across NVIDIA GeForce RTX GPUs, the NVIDIA RTX PRO platform and NVIDIA DGX Spark systems, from local PCs to the clou

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.summary_zh: 重点：A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.
items.summary_en: Focus: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

items.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.
items.summary_en: Focus: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.

items.title: Direct Preference Optimization Beyond Chatbots

items.title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits
items.summary_zh: 重点：How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.
items.summary_en: Focus: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.

items.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
items.summary_zh: 重点：How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.
items.summary_en: Focus: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary_zh: 重点：Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
items.summary_en: Focus: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.summary_zh: 重点：Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.summary_en: Focus: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

items.title: Benchmarking inference at scale: coding agents
items.summary_zh: 重点：Real-world inference benchmarks for coding agents: 31% more TPS than TensorRT-LLM, 2× better TTFT at saturation, and 76% lower cost than Claude Opus 4.6.
items.summary_en: Focus: Real-world inference benchmarks for coding agents: 31% more TPS than TensorRT-LLM, 2× better TTFT at saturation, and 76% lower cost than Claude Opus 4.6.

items.title: How Together AI built the world’s fastest speech-to-text stack
items.summary_zh: 重点：Together AI built the fastest speech-to-text stack on Artificial Analysis by treating ASR as a full-path systems problem, not just a GPU inference problem.
items.summary_en: Focus: Together AI built the fastest speech-to-text stack on Artificial Analysis by treating ASR as a full-path systems problem, not just a GPU inference problem.

items.title: Together AI and Pearl Research Labs Team Up to Reduce the Cost of AI Inference
items.summary_zh: 重点：Together AI partners with Pearl Research Labs to launch a discounted Pearl-powered inference endpoint for Gemma-4-31B-it-pearl, using Proof of Useful Work to turn AI workloads into crypto emissions.
items.summary_en: Focus: Together AI partners with Pearl Research Labs to launch a discounted Pearl-powered inference endpoint for Gemma-4-31B-it-pearl, using Proof of Useful Work to turn AI workloads into crypto emissions.
